title: circaea lutetiana proles erubescens
intro: Circaea lutetiana proles erubescens is a subspecies of the Enchanter's Nightshade plant, which belongs to the family of wood sorrels and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Circaea lutetiana proles erubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antispasmodic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
